name: Weekly Assessment System
description: Standardized 5-dimension assessment + task completion rate. Produces a numeric score that tracks progress over time and determines readiness for advancement.

dimensions.name: Speaking Fluency
dimensions.assessment_method: 60-second recorded response to a prompt. Scored on WPM, pauses, grammar accuracy, task completion.

dimensions.name: Listening Comprehension
dimensions.assessment_method: 5 questions on a short audio clip at target WPM for the level.

dimensions.name: Vocabulary Recall
dimensions.assessment_method: 15 words from this week + last week. Match definition or use in sentence.

dimensions.name: Accent/Pronunciation
dimensions.assessment_method: Read a 3-sentence passage aloud. Scored on phoneme accuracy for this week's targets.

dimensions.name: Writing Sample
dimensions.assessment_method: Write 5 sentences on a given topic (timed: 8 minutes).

dimensions.name: Task Completion Rate
dimensions.assessment_method: Automatic: (tasks submitted this week / total tasks) × 100

delivery_format.channel: Discord DM to each active member
delivery_format.trigger: n8n scheduled workflow OR Discord bot scheduled task (Sunday 10 AM)
delivery_format.message_template:
📊 **WEEKLY ASSESSMENT — Week {WEEK}**
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Complete these 5 tasks today (30 min total):

**1️⃣ SPEAKING** (5 min)
Record yourself answering:
"{SPEAKING_PROMPT}"
→ Target: 60 seconds, no script
→ Send the recording HERE (this DM)

**2️⃣ LISTENING** (5 min)
Listen to this clip: {AUDIO_DESCRIPTION}
Answer these questions:
{LISTENING_QUESTIONS}

**3️⃣ VOCABULARY** (5 min)
Define or use these 15 words in a sentence:
{VOCABULARY_LIST}

**4️⃣ PRONUNCIATION** (5 min)
Read this passage aloud and record:
"{READING_PASSAGE}"
→ Send recording HERE

**5️⃣ WRITING** (8 min)
Write 5 sentences about:
"{WRITING_PROMPT}"
→ Type your response HERE

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
⏰ Due by: Sunday 11:59 PM
Task completion rate is calculated automatically from your !done submissions this week.

week_1.speaking: Tell me your name, where you are from, and one thing you like. Speak for 60 seconds.
week_1.listening_description: Short self-introduction at 75 WPM (from module2_listening Section A style)
week_1.reading_passage: Hello. My name is ___. I am from ___. I live in a nice place. I like to learn English every day. My friend helps me. I am happy.
week_1.writing_prompt: Write about yourself: your name, where you live, what you like, and why you want to learn English.

week_2.speaking: Describe your daily routine from morning to evening. What time do you wake up? What do you do?
week_2.reading_passage: I wake up early every morning. First, I eat breakfast. Then I go to work. I usually finish at five. In the evening, I study English. I always go to sleep before eleven.
week_2.writing_prompt: Write about your morning routine. What time do you wake up? What do you eat? Where do you go?

week_3.speaking: Tell me about your family. Who are they? What do they do? Describe one person.
week_3.reading_passage: My family is not very big. My mother is kind. She works as a nurse. My father is tall and strong. He drives a taxi. We live together and I love them.
week_3.writing_prompt: Write about your family. How many people? What do they do? Describe one person you love.

week_4.speaking: Describe your home. What rooms are there? What do you do in the morning and evening?
week_4.listening_description: Home and routine description at 78 WPM
week_4.reading_passage: My house is not very big. I have a bedroom and a small kitchen. I don't have a garden. Every morning I open the window. I usually clean the kitchen first. Then I eat breakfast. My house is comfortable.
week_4.writing_prompt: Describe your home and your evening routine. Use: first, then, after that, finally.

week_5.speaking: Talk about food. What do you like to eat? Where do you buy food? Order something at a restaurant.
week_5.reading_passage: I am hungry. I want to buy some food. The restaurant near my house is not expensive. I usually order chicken and rice. The food is always delicious. I prefer tea, not coffee. How much does the bread cost?
week_5.writing_prompt: Write about food: what you like, what you don't like, where you buy food, and your favorite meal.

week_6.speaking: Describe your neighborhood. What places are near your house? Give directions from your house to the nearest shop.
week_6.reading_passage: Excuse me, where is the bank? Go straight on this street. Then turn left. The bank is next to the hospital. There is a park between the school and the market. It is not far from here.
week_6.writing_prompt: Describe your neighborhood using 'there is/are' and prepositions. Give directions to a place.

week_7.speaking: Talk about abilities. What can you do well? What can't you do? What do you want to learn?
week_7.listening_description: Abilities and skills discussion at 80 WPM
week_7.reading_passage: I can speak Arabic quickly, but I can't speak English fast yet. It is difficult but not impossible. I practice carefully every day. I can already understand some English. I am getting better slowly. It is really important to be consistent.
week_7.writing_prompt: Write about your abilities: 5 things you can do and 3 things you can't do yet. Use adverbs (quickly, slowly, well).

week_8.speaking: Talk about how you feel today, what you did yesterday, and what you hope for next week.
week_8.listening_description: Past events and feelings at 80 WPM
week_8.reading_passage: Yesterday I was tired because I worked a lot. But I was happy because I studied English. Last week I visited my friend. We played together and it was wonderful. I feel good now. I believe I am improving. I hope next week will be even better.
week_8.writing_prompt: Write about yesterday AND how you feel today. Use past tense (was, were, -ed verbs) and feeling words.

auto_scored.vocabulary: Correct definitions or appropriate usage → correct/15 × 100
auto_scored.completion: Tasks submitted via !done this week / 7×7(or track-adjusted) × 100

ai_scored.writing: Use Writing Assessment prompt (#9) from §11 → returns 0-100
ai_scored.speaking: Phase 1 (pilot): founder listens and scores using rubric. Phase 2+: Whisper transcription → Speaking Evaluation prompt (#5)
ai_scored.accent: Phase 1: founder scores using accent rubric. Phase 2+: AI pronunciation analysis

scoring_pipeline.overall_calculation: Sum of (dimension_score × weight) for all 6 dimensions
scoring_pipeline.delivery_of_results: Monday morning DM with visual progress report (prompt #10 generates this)

90-100.action: Maintain approach. Consider peer mentoring role.

80-89.action: Minor adjustments. Focus on weakest dimension.

70-79.action: Review daily execution. Fix gaps in weakest area.

60-69.action: Mandatory check-in. Buddy outreach. Revised study plan.

below_60.action: Immediate 1-on-1. Personal coaching. Consider track adjustment.

advancement_readiness.indicator: When overall score is consistently 80+ for 3 consecutive weeks AND all dimensions are above their passing threshold, the learner is flagged as 'advancement-ready'.
advancement_readiness.notification: Bot DMs the learner: 'You're showing strong progress! You may be ready for the Level Exit Exam. Would you like to attempt it this month? Type !exam to learn more.'
